coverage_note: The bundled AR population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from AR androgen receptor transcriptional control, steroid signaling, CAG-repeat modulation, prostate biology, and endocrine therapy response and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000169083: AR coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: AR findings should be read against androgen receptor transcriptional control, steroid signaling, CAG-repeat modulation, prostate biology, and endocrine therapy response; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

AR CAG-repeat model is curated as a AR marker for Androgen signaling and prostate biology, Androgen insensitivity and endocrine review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

AR ligand-binding-domain resistance model is curated as a AR marker for Androgen signaling and prostate biology, Androgen insensitivity and endocrine review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
